reasoning: The dagger is a competent pixel art weapon sprite with clean edges and a distinctive teal accent color, but it fundamentally fails the cute+charm criteria. The shape is inherently pointy and aggressive — the exact 'edgy aggressive shapes' flagged as bad. At 1x it reads as barely a smear of pixels with no discernible personality. On the dark background the teal pops reasonably well, but the grey blade merges into the light/white background, breaking silhouette clarity. No round or soft elements exist; there is no toy-like warmth or Echoes of Wisdom friendliness. Personality is neutral-to-threatening, not charming. Would need a fundamental redesign (chubby proportions, exaggerated round guard, softer blade taper, expressive color) to pass charm criteria.
